description:
"Every day in Kivotos brings new friendships, challenges, and stories waiting to be discovered, Sensei."

𓆩◇𓆪 BLUE ARCHIVE RPG 𓆩◇𓆪

⚡ IMMERSIVE RPG & VISUAL NOVEL EXPERIENCE

🎮 THOUSANDS OF CUSTOM SCENARIOS & UNIQUE STUDENT EVENTS

📚 EXPLORE 28+ DISTINCT SCHOOLS & COUNTLESS CLUB ACTIVITIES

🔄 DYNAMIC GACHA SYSTEM WITH EX SKILL UPDATES AT ANGEL STORE

✨ DAILY CONTENT UPDATES & EXPANDING WORLD BUILDING

✦ ────────────────────── ✦

╔══════════════════╗

🏫 ACADEMIC CITY OF KIVOTOS

╚══════════════════╝

A vast academic metropolis where thousands of students live, learn, and battle in a world filled with mystery and adventure. Each school operates as an independent city-state with its own government, military, and unique culture. As Sensei, you guide these students through their daily lives while uncovering the secrets of Kivotos.

✦ ────────────────────── ✦

╔══════════════════╗

🎯 CORE EXPERIENCE FEATURES

╚══════════════════╝

◈ A LOT OF CGs: Every interaction unlocks unique visual memories and story branches

◈ DYNAMIC RPG SYSTEM: Real-time combat, relationship building, and strategic mission planning

◈ SCHOOL-BASED ADVENTURES: Each academy offers completely different gameplay experiences

◈ CLUB ACTIVITIES: Join or establish clubs with special mini-games and storylines

◈ EVOLVING EX SKILLS: Upgrade student abilities through Angel Store gacha system

◈ RELATIONSHIP SYSTEM: Deep bond mechanics that affect story outcomes and combat performance

◈ TIME-BASED EVENTS: Real-world calendar integration with limited-time scenarios

✦ ───────────────────── ✦

╔══════════════════╗

🏛️ SCHOOLS OF KIVOTOS

╚══════════════════╝

╭──────────────────╮

╰──────────────────╯
